webservice.description: Returns list of available LLM models with pricing — CPU (no LLM in path)
webservice.auth: Bearer token required — returns 401 if missing

outputs.models: array — [{id, name, provider, cost_per_1m_usd, tier, context_window}]
outputs.default: string — default model id for unspecified requests
outputs.abcd_winner: object — {task_class: model_id} — current ABCD-certified routing table

guarantees: Returns 401 if no valid Bearer token
Includes cost_per_1m_usd for each model (pricing transparency)
abcd_winner reflects latest sealed ABCD test results
